change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.abstract: Includes meeting minutes; subject files, including materials on activities and scholarships; newsletters; and files from the earlier separate Cornell Women's Club of Maryland.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Contains information from over 60 years about the Cornell Club of Maryland. Includes meeting minutes, information on clubs, activities and scholarships that the Club was involved in, including parties and alumni get-togethers. Also has lists of members throughout the years, and different descriptions of Cornell throughout the years.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Cornell Club of Maryland records, #41-6-3953. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Flyers and scripts from events and speeches

did.unittitle: Master Copies of Cornell Picnic Material
